payload.message:
可以，我按“数据怎么流动”的顺序，把这条 banner 链路从接口到 UI，再到点击后的业务落地，完整串起来讲。

**总览**
这套 banner 其实分成两条页面链路：

- 首页走 `apppage/launch`
- 添加页走 `apppage/discovery`

它们底层都复用同一套解析和渲染框架，只是入口接口、落点页面、支持的 banner 类型不完全一样。

主链路是：

1. `WBNetworkManager+Apppage` 请求服务端 banner JSON
2. `WBBannerModel` 根据 `type/subtype` 把 JSON 变成业务模型
3. `WBBannerViewModel` 根据 banner 类型选渲染策略
4. 不同 `Strategy / ViewFactory / SectionCell` 生成最终 UIView
5. 页面把 UIView 塞进 table/collection 里显示
6. 用户点击后，再通过 route / 通知 / vapp 流程落地

---

**1. 服务端数据是怎么拿下来的**

统一入口在 [WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L14)。

它提供了 3 个接口：

- `apppage_launch` -> `POST apppage/launch`
- `apppage_discovery` -> `POST apppage/discovery`
- `apppage_splash` -> `POST apppage/splash`

真正的公共实现是 [WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L26) 的 `apppage:callback:`：

- 拼出 URL，比如 `apppage/launch`
- `POST` 请求
- 期待服务端返回的是 `NSArray<NSDictionary *>`
- 每个字典都转成一个 `WBBannerModel`

也就是服务端返回的不是“某个具体 view 数据”，而是一组 banner 配置数组。

---

**2. JSON 怎么变成 WBBannerModel**

核心在 [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L27)。

服务端每个 banner dict 进来以后，先看 `type`：

- `type == "applist"` -> `WBBannerTypeApplist`
- `type == "banner"` -> `WBBannerTypeRichMessage`

然后保存：

- `name`
- `subtype`
- `data`

但 `subtype` 和 `data` 不是自己硬解析，而是交给 mapper：

- 应用列表用 `WBBannerApplistMapper`
- 富文本 banner 用 `WBBannerRichMessageMapper`

也就是这里把“类型分发”做掉了。

顺带提一句，`WBBannerModel.h` 里虽然定义了 `WBBannerTypeAds`，但当前 [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L29) 没有把任何服务端 `type` 映射成 ads。  
所以从现有代码看，**真正接上的主要是 `applist` 和 `banner` 两种**。`ads` 更像是预留/遗留分支。

---

**3. 两种 mapper 分别做了什么**

**3.1 applist banner**
在 [WBBannerApplistMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerApplistMapper.m#L26)。

它做两件事：

- 把 `subtype` 字符串转成枚举
  - `horizontal`
  - `vertical`
- 把 `data` 数组解析成 `WBVAppBaseHttpModel`，再交给 `WBVAppManager` 转成 `WBVAppModel`

所以 applist banner 最终的 `bannerModel.data` 是：

- `NSArray<WBVAppModel *>`

这意味着到 UI 层时，它已经不是原始 JSON 了，而是完整的 vapp 业务模型。

**3.2 rich message banner**
在 [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L22)。

它同样做两件事：

- 把 `subtype` 转成
  - `normal`
  - `through`
- 把 `data` 数组里的每个 dict 转成 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`

所以 rich message banner 的 `bannerModel.data` 最终是：

- `NSArray<WBRichMessageLinkModel *>`

这里有个关键点：mapper 把 `sourceInterface` 一路传给了 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`。  
这个值就是当前来源接口，比如 `apppage/launch` 或 `apppage/discovery`，后面 route 落地时会带着它走。

---

**4. 页面是在哪里触发加载的**

**4.1 首页**
首页在 [WBHomeViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Home/Controller/Main/WBHomeViewController.m#L163) 的 `viewDidLoad` 里调了 `loadBannerData`。

真正实现是在 [WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L19)：

- 调 `WBBannerManager.sharedInstance loadBannerDataWithCompletion`
- `WBBannerManager` 内部再调用 `apppage_launch`：[WBBannerManager.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Manager/WBBannerManager.m#L24)
- 成功后保存到 `bannerArray`
- 回到首页执行 `processBannerArray`

首页的 `processBannerArray` 在 [WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L28)。

它只处理：

- `WBBannerTypeAds`
- `WBBannerTypeRichMessage`

没处理 `Applist`。  
所以从代码意图看，**`apppage/launch` 给首页的内容应该主要是 rich message/ads，不应该下发 applist**。这是我根据代码做的推断。

rich message 最后会被放到：

- `self.bannerRichMessageView`

然后挂在 collection header 上：[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L78)

**4.2 添加页**
添加页在 [WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L129) 的 `loadData` 里调：

- `[[WBNetworkManager defaultManager] apppage_discovery:...]`

拿到结果后：

- `self.banners = banners`
- `reloadData`

添加页 table 的 section 数量直接等于 `self.banners.count`：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L239)

每个 section 取一个 `WBBannerModel`，再交给 `WBBannerViewModel` 生成视图：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L250)

所以添加页是“服务端下发几个 banner，就渲染几个 section”。

---

**5. WBBannerViewModel 怎么决定渲染哪种 UI**

在 [WBBannerViewModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerViewModel.m#L30)。

它只做一层策略分发：

- `Applist` -> `WBBannerApplistStrategy`
- `RichMessage` -> `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`

然后：

- `generateBannerView` -> 生成 UIView
- `performBannerActionInViewController` -> 执行动作

但从当前代码看，真正实现了 `performAction...` 的子类并没搜到。  
所以目前“banner 落地动作”主要还是发生在 **生成出来的具体子 view / cell 内部**，不是靠 strategy 顶层处理。

---

**6. applist banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L25)。

它会生成一个 `productView`，里面分两块：

- `headerView`
- `mainView`

你刚刚问的那段就是这里。

**6.1 headerView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L66)

职责是：

- 展示 `bannerModel.name`
- 如果 subtype 是 `horizontal`，额外展示“查看全部”按钮

“查看全部”点击后会：

- 新建 `WBAddVAppListViewController`
- 把 `bannerModel.data` 里的整组 `WBVAppModel` 塞进去
- push 进去

也就是说 applist banner 的一个典型落地是：

- 从 banner 区进入“完整应用列表页”

**6.2 mainView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L57)

它创建的是 `WBAddVappSectionCell`，并把：

- `banner`
- 滚动方向

灌进去。

`WBAddVappSectionCell` 在 [WBAddVappSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddVappSectionCell.m#L20) 会把 `banner.data` 视为 `NSArray<WBVAppModel *>`，每个 item 渲染成一个 `WBAddVAppCell`。

再往下：

- `WBAddBaseSectionCell` 负责内部 `UICollectionView` 框架：[WBAddBaseSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/WBAddBaseSectionCell.m#L33)
- `WBAddVAppCell` 负责一个应用卡片的 icon、名称、预约人数、操作按钮：[WBAddVAppCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddVAppCell.m#L35)

**6.3 applist banner 的“最后落地”**
真正的业务动作在 `WBAddOperationButton` 里：

- `获取` -> 发 `WBGetVAppNotification`
- `打开` / `我的应用` -> 发 `WBAddPageClickMyVAppNotification`
- `重新下载` -> 发 `WBForceRedownloadVappNotification`
- `预约` -> 发 `WBReserveVAppNotification`

对应代码在 [WBAddOperationButton.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/View/WBAddOperationButton.m#L27)。

所以 applist banner 的落地，不是点整张 banner，而是点里面每个 vapp 卡片右侧按钮，再进入：

- 获取应用
- 打开应用
- 重新下载
- 预约

这些后续链路都已经接到首页/manager 里了。

---

**7. rich message banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m#L29)。

它看 `subtype` 决定用哪个 view factory：

- `normal` -> `WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl`
- `through` -> `WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory`

这两种长得不一样，落地方式也不一样。

---

**8. rich message 的 normal 分支**

在 [WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/normal/WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m#L24)。

它会把 `bannerModel.data` 里的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 组装成 `WBRichMessageBanner` 轮播组件：

- 如果正好 2 个，就左右双卡
- 否则单个轮播容器

真正的点击和轮播逻辑在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L30)

它会：

- 用 imageURL 渲染图片
- 自动轮播
- 点击当前 banner 时，取到对应的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`
- 如果有 `generalAction` 就执行

`generalAction` 的定义在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L85)，不同 type 会落到不同业务：

- `Webview` -> app 内 webview
- `AppstoreInfo` -> App Store 详情
- `AppstoreSearch` -> App Store 搜索
- `Safari` -> 外部 Safari
- `WBRoute` -> 走 `WBRouteManager performRoute`
- 其他类型部分不在这里做通用 action

如果是下面这些类型，点击后还会额外上报 banner 点击事件：

- `WBRoute`
- `Safari`
- `Webview`

代码在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L216)

所以 normal rich message 的“最后落地”是：

- 打开 webview
- 打开 Safari
- 打开 App Store
- 跳内部 route
- 同时部分场景上报 `notice/bannerEvent`

---

**9. rich message 的 through 分支**

入口在 [WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/through/WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m#L24)。

它生成的结构也是：

- `headerView`：只显示标题 `bannerModel.name`
- `mainView`：`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell`

`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 再把每个 item 渲染成 `WBAddRichMessageCell`：[WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m#L42)

`WBAddRichMessageCell` 目前做的事情很明确：[WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L41)

- 展示图片 `imageURL`
- 如果 `type == WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet`
- 就根据 `link` 里的 vappId 调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`
- 拉到最新 vapp 信息后，在图片底部叠加一个 vapp bar

所以 through 分支更像“带应用入口信息的内容卡片”。

**重要一点：**
从当前仓库代码看，`through` 这条分支 **主要是展示**。  
我没有在 `WBAddRichMessageCell` / `WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 里看到整卡点击后的路由处理，所以它当前更像“内容卡片 + 底部应用信息条”，而不是 normal 那种“点图直接跳转”的轮播广告。

---

**10. 首页和添加页最后各自长成什么样**

**首页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/launch`
- 存储位置：`WBBannerManager.bannerArray`
- 主要展示：`bannerRichMessageView`
- 挂载位置：首页 collection header
- 代码：[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L45)

**添加页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/discovery`
- 存储位置：`WBAddViewController.banners`
- 展示方式：tableView 每个 section 一个 banner
- 代码：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L155)

---

**11. 这套链路里几个你值得注意的点**

- `sourceInterface` 会从网络层一路传到 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`，这样 banner 点击后走 route 时，能知道它来自 `apppage/launch` 还是 `apppage/discovery`。
- `applist` banner 的数据在 mapper 阶段就已经转成 `WBVAppModel`，后面 UI 不再碰原始 JSON。
- `normal rich message` 是“图片轮播 + 点击跳转”。
- `through rich message` 是“标题 + 富文本卡片列表 + 底部应用条”，当前更偏展示。
- `WBBannerTypeAds` 在模型层没看到实际映射代码，但首页流程里保留了 `showAdsWithBanner:` 分支，这块当前代码存在一定不一致。

如果你想要，我下一步可以继续给你画一张“真实调用时序图”，直接按下面这种格式展开：

- `apppage/discovery`
- `WBAddViewController`
- `WBBannerModel`
- `WBBannerViewModel`
- `WBBannerApplistStrategy / WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`
- `WBAddVAppCell / WBRichMessageBanner / WBAddRichMessageCell`
- `通知 / route / getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`

这样你读起来会比纯文字更直观。

content.text:
可以，我按“数据怎么流动”的顺序，把这条 banner 链路从接口到 UI，再到点击后的业务落地，完整串起来讲。

**总览**
这套 banner 其实分成两条页面链路：

- 首页走 `apppage/launch`
- 添加页走 `apppage/discovery`

它们底层都复用同一套解析和渲染框架，只是入口接口、落点页面、支持的 banner 类型不完全一样。

主链路是：

1. `WBNetworkManager+Apppage` 请求服务端 banner JSON
2. `WBBannerModel` 根据 `type/subtype` 把 JSON 变成业务模型
3. `WBBannerViewModel` 根据 banner 类型选渲染策略
4. 不同 `Strategy / ViewFactory / SectionCell` 生成最终 UIView
5. 页面把 UIView 塞进 table/collection 里显示
6. 用户点击后，再通过 route / 通知 / vapp 流程落地

---

**1. 服务端数据是怎么拿下来的**

统一入口在 [WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L14)。

它提供了 3 个接口：

- `apppage_launch` -> `POST apppage/launch`
- `apppage_discovery` -> `POST apppage/discovery`
- `apppage_splash` -> `POST apppage/splash`

真正的公共实现是 [WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L26) 的 `apppage:callback:`：

- 拼出 URL，比如 `apppage/launch`
- `POST` 请求
- 期待服务端返回的是 `NSArray<NSDictionary *>`
- 每个字典都转成一个 `WBBannerModel`

也就是服务端返回的不是“某个具体 view 数据”，而是一组 banner 配置数组。

---

**2. JSON 怎么变成 WBBannerModel**

核心在 [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L27)。

服务端每个 banner dict 进来以后，先看 `type`：

- `type == "applist"` -> `WBBannerTypeApplist`
- `type == "banner"` -> `WBBannerTypeRichMessage`

然后保存：

- `name`
- `subtype`
- `data`

但 `subtype` 和 `data` 不是自己硬解析，而是交给 mapper：

- 应用列表用 `WBBannerApplistMapper`
- 富文本 banner 用 `WBBannerRichMessageMapper`

也就是这里把“类型分发”做掉了。

顺带提一句，`WBBannerModel.h` 里虽然定义了 `WBBannerTypeAds`，但当前 [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L29) 没有把任何服务端 `type` 映射成 ads。  
所以从现有代码看，**真正接上的主要是 `applist` 和 `banner` 两种**。`ads` 更像是预留/遗留分支。

---

**3. 两种 mapper 分别做了什么**

**3.1 applist banner**
在 [WBBannerApplistMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerApplistMapper.m#L26)。

它做两件事：

- 把 `subtype` 字符串转成枚举
  - `horizontal`
  - `vertical`
- 把 `data` 数组解析成 `WBVAppBaseHttpModel`，再交给 `WBVAppManager` 转成 `WBVAppModel`

所以 applist banner 最终的 `bannerModel.data` 是：

- `NSArray<WBVAppModel *>`

这意味着到 UI 层时，它已经不是原始 JSON 了，而是完整的 vapp 业务模型。

**3.2 rich message banner**
在 [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L22)。

它同样做两件事：

- 把 `subtype` 转成
  - `normal`
  - `through`
- 把 `data` 数组里的每个 dict 转成 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`

所以 rich message banner 的 `bannerModel.data` 最终是：

- `NSArray<WBRichMessageLinkModel *>`

这里有个关键点：mapper 把 `sourceInterface` 一路传给了 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`。  
这个值就是当前来源接口，比如 `apppage/launch` 或 `apppage/discovery`，后面 route 落地时会带着它走。

---

**4. 页面是在哪里触发加载的**

**4.1 首页**
首页在 [WBHomeViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Home/Controller/Main/WBHomeViewController.m#L163) 的 `viewDidLoad` 里调了 `loadBannerData`。

真正实现是在 [WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L19)：

- 调 `WBBannerManager.sharedInstance loadBannerDataWithCompletion`
- `WBBannerManager` 内部再调用 `apppage_launch`：[WBBannerManager.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Manager/WBBannerManager.m#L24)
- 成功后保存到 `bannerArray`
- 回到首页执行 `processBannerArray`

首页的 `processBannerArray` 在 [WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L28)。

它只处理：

- `WBBannerTypeAds`
- `WBBannerTypeRichMessage`

没处理 `Applist`。  
所以从代码意图看，**`apppage/launch` 给首页的内容应该主要是 rich message/ads，不应该下发 applist**。这是我根据代码做的推断。

rich message 最后会被放到：

- `self.bannerRichMessageView`

然后挂在 collection header 上：[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L78)

**4.2 添加页**
添加页在 [WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L129) 的 `loadData` 里调：

- `[[WBNetworkManager defaultManager] apppage_discovery:...]`

拿到结果后：

- `self.banners = banners`
- `reloadData`

添加页 table 的 section 数量直接等于 `self.banners.count`：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L239)

每个 section 取一个 `WBBannerModel`，再交给 `WBBannerViewModel` 生成视图：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L250)

所以添加页是“服务端下发几个 banner，就渲染几个 section”。

---

**5. WBBannerViewModel 怎么决定渲染哪种 UI**

在 [WBBannerViewModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerViewModel.m#L30)。

它只做一层策略分发：

- `Applist` -> `WBBannerApplistStrategy`
- `RichMessage` -> `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`

然后：

- `generateBannerView` -> 生成 UIView
- `performBannerActionInViewController` -> 执行动作

但从当前代码看，真正实现了 `performAction...` 的子类并没搜到。  
所以目前“banner 落地动作”主要还是发生在 **生成出来的具体子 view / cell 内部**，不是靠 strategy 顶层处理。

---

**6. applist banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L25)。

它会生成一个 `productView`，里面分两块：

- `headerView`
- `mainView`

你刚刚问的那段就是这里。

**6.1 headerView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L66)

职责是：

- 展示 `bannerModel.name`
- 如果 subtype 是 `horizontal`，额外展示“查看全部”按钮

“查看全部”点击后会：

- 新建 `WBAddVAppListViewController`
- 把 `bannerModel.data` 里的整组 `WBVAppModel` 塞进去
- push 进去

也就是说 applist banner 的一个典型落地是：

- 从 banner 区进入“完整应用列表页”

**6.2 mainView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L57)

它创建的是 `WBAddVappSectionCell`，并把：

- `banner`
- 滚动方向

灌进去。

`WBAddVappSectionCell` 在 [WBAddVappSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddVappSectionCell.m#L20) 会把 `banner.data` 视为 `NSArray<WBVAppModel *>`，每个 item 渲染成一个 `WBAddVAppCell`。

再往下：

- `WBAddBaseSectionCell` 负责内部 `UICollectionView` 框架：[WBAddBaseSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/WBAddBaseSectionCell.m#L33)
- `WBAddVAppCell` 负责一个应用卡片的 icon、名称、预约人数、操作按钮：[WBAddVAppCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddVAppCell.m#L35)

**6.3 applist banner 的“最后落地”**
真正的业务动作在 `WBAddOperationButton` 里：

- `获取` -> 发 `WBGetVAppNotification`
- `打开` / `我的应用` -> 发 `WBAddPageClickMyVAppNotification`
- `重新下载` -> 发 `WBForceRedownloadVappNotification`
- `预约` -> 发 `WBReserveVAppNotification`

对应代码在 [WBAddOperationButton.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/View/WBAddOperationButton.m#L27)。

所以 applist banner 的落地，不是点整张 banner，而是点里面每个 vapp 卡片右侧按钮，再进入：

- 获取应用
- 打开应用
- 重新下载
- 预约

这些后续链路都已经接到首页/manager 里了。

---

**7. rich message banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m#L29)。

它看 `subtype` 决定用哪个 view factory：

- `normal` -> `WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl`
- `through` -> `WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory`

这两种长得不一样，落地方式也不一样。

---

**8. rich message 的 normal 分支**

在 [WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/normal/WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m#L24)。

它会把 `bannerModel.data` 里的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 组装成 `WBRichMessageBanner` 轮播组件：

- 如果正好 2 个，就左右双卡
- 否则单个轮播容器

真正的点击和轮播逻辑在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L30)

它会：

- 用 imageURL 渲染图片
- 自动轮播
- 点击当前 banner 时，取到对应的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`
- 如果有 `generalAction` 就执行

`generalAction` 的定义在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L85)，不同 type 会落到不同业务：

- `Webview` -> app 内 webview
- `AppstoreInfo` -> App Store 详情
- `AppstoreSearch` -> App Store 搜索
- `Safari` -> 外部 Safari
- `WBRoute` -> 走 `WBRouteManager performRoute`
- 其他类型部分不在这里做通用 action

如果是下面这些类型，点击后还会额外上报 banner 点击事件：

- `WBRoute`
- `Safari`
- `Webview`

代码在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L216)

所以 normal rich message 的“最后落地”是：

- 打开 webview
- 打开 Safari
- 打开 App Store
- 跳内部 route
- 同时部分场景上报 `notice/bannerEvent`

---

**9. rich message 的 through 分支**

入口在 [WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/through/WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m#L24)。

它生成的结构也是：

- `headerView`：只显示标题 `bannerModel.name`
- `mainView`：`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell`

`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 再把每个 item 渲染成 `WBAddRichMessageCell`：[WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m#L42)

`WBAddRichMessageCell` 目前做的事情很明确：[WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L41)

- 展示图片 `imageURL`
- 如果 `type == WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet`
- 就根据 `link` 里的 vappId 调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`
- 拉到最新 vapp 信息后，在图片底部叠加一个 vapp bar

所以 through 分支更像“带应用入口信息的内容卡片”。

**重要一点：**
从当前仓库代码看，`through` 这条分支 **主要是展示**。  
我没有在 `WBAddRichMessageCell` / `WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 里看到整卡点击后的路由处理，所以它当前更像“内容卡片 + 底部应用信息条”，而不是 normal 那种“点图直接跳转”的轮播广告。

---

**10. 首页和添加页最后各自长成什么样**

**首页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/launch`
- 存储位置：`WBBannerManager.bannerArray`
- 主要展示：`bannerRichMessageView`
- 挂载位置：首页 collection header
- 代码：[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L45)

**添加页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/discovery`
- 存储位置：`WBAddViewController.banners`
- 展示方式：tableView 每个 section 一个 banner
- 代码：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L155)

---

**11. 这套链路里几个你值得注意的点**

- `sourceInterface` 会从网络层一路传到 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`，这样 banner 点击后走 route 时，能知道它来自 `apppage/launch` 还是 `apppage/discovery`。
- `applist` banner 的数据在 mapper 阶段就已经转成 `WBVAppModel`，后面 UI 不再碰原始 JSON。
- `normal rich message` 是“图片轮播 + 点击跳转”。
- `through rich message` 是“标题 + 富文本卡片列表 + 底部应用条”，当前更偏展示。
- `WBBannerTypeAds` 在模型层没看到实际映射代码，但首页流程里保留了 `showAdsWithBanner:` 分支，这块当前代码存在一定不一致。

如果你想要，我下一步可以继续给你画一张“真实调用时序图”，直接按下面这种格式展开：

- `apppage/discovery`
- `WBAddViewController`
- `WBBannerModel`
- `WBBannerViewModel`
- `WBBannerApplistStrategy / WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`
- `WBAddVAppCell / WBRichMessageBanner / WBAddRichMessageCell`
- `通知 / route / getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`

这样你读起来会比纯文字更直观。

这套 banner 其实分成两条页面链路：

- 首页走 `apppage/launch`
- 添加页走 `apppage/discovery`

它们底层都复用同一套解析和渲染框架，只是入口接口、落点页面、支持的 banner 类型不完全一样。

4. 不同 `Strategy / ViewFactory / SectionCell` 生成最终 UIView
5. 页面把 UIView 塞进 table/collection 里显示

每个 section 取一个 `WBBannerModel`，再交给 `WBBannerViewModel` 生成视图：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L250)

所以添加页是“服务端下发几个 banner，就渲染几个 section”。

---

**5. WBBannerViewModel 怎么决定渲染哪种 UI**

在 [WBBannerViewModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerViewModel.m#L30)。

它只做一层策略分发：

- `Applist` -> `WBBannerApplistStrategy`
- `RichMessage` -> `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`

然后：

- `generateBannerView` -> 生成 UIView
- `performBannerActionInViewController` -> 执行动作

但从当前代码看，真正实现了 `performAction...` 的子类并没搜到。  
所以目前“banner 落地动作”主要还是发生在 **生成出来的具体子 view / cell 内部**，不是靠 strategy 顶层处理。

---

**6. applist banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L25)。

它会生成一个 `productView`，里面分两块：

- `headerView`
- `mainView`

你刚刚问的那段就是这里。

**6.1 headerView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L66)

职责是：

- 展示 `bannerModel.name`
- 如果 subtype 是 `horizontal`，额外展示“查看全部”按钮

“查看全部”点击后会：

- 新建 `WBAddVAppListViewController`
- 把 `bannerModel.data` 里的整组 `WBVAppModel` 塞进去
- push 进去

也就是说 applist banner 的一个典型落地是：

- 从 banner 区进入“完整应用列表页”

**6.2 mainView**
在 [WBBannerApplistStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/WBBannerApplistStrategy.m#L57)

它创建的是 `WBAddVappSectionCell`，并把：

- `banner`
- 滚动方向

灌进去。

`WBAddVappSectionCell` 在 [WBAddVappSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddVappSectionCell.m#L20) 会把 `banner.data` 视为 `NSArray<WBVAppModel *>`，每个 item 渲染成一个 `WBAddVAppCell`。

再往下：

- `WBAddBaseSectionCell` 负责内部 `UICollectionView` 框架：[WBAddBaseSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/WBAddBaseSectionCell.m#L33)
- `WBAddVAppCell` 负责一个应用卡片的 icon、名称、预约人数、操作按钮：[WBAddVAppCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddVAppCell.m#L35)

**6.3 applist banner 的“最后落地”**
真正的业务动作在 `WBAddOperationButton` 里：

- `获取` -> 发 `WBGetVAppNotification`
- `打开` / `我的应用` -> 发 `WBAddPageClickMyVAppNotification`
- `重新下载` -> 发 `WBForceRedownloadVappNotification`
- `预约` -> 发 `WBReserveVAppNotification`

对应代码在 [WBAddOperationButton.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/View/WBAddOperationButton.m#L27)。

所以 applist banner 的落地，不是点整张 banner，而是点里面每个 vapp 卡片右侧按钮，再进入：

- 获取应用
- 打开应用
- 重新下载
- 预约

这些后续链路都已经接到首页/manager 里了。

---

**7. rich message banner 最后是怎么渲染出来的**

入口在 [WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m#L29)。

它看 `subtype` 决定用哪个 view factory：

- `normal` -> `WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl`
- `through` -> `WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory`

这两种长得不一样，落地方式也不一样。

---

**8. rich message 的 normal 分支**

在 [WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/normal/WBRichMessageNormalBannerViewFactory_ZLImpl.m#L24)。

它会把 `bannerModel.data` 里的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 组装成 `WBRichMessageBanner` 轮播组件：

- 如果正好 2 个，就左右双卡
- 否则单个轮播容器

真正的点击和轮播逻辑在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L30)

它会：

- 用 imageURL 渲染图片
- 自动轮播
- 点击当前 banner 时，取到对应的 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`
- 如果有 `generalAction` 就执行

`generalAction` 的定义在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L85)，不同 type 会落到不同业务：

- `Webview` -> app 内 webview
- `AppstoreInfo` -> App Store 详情
- `AppstoreSearch` -> App Store 搜索
- `Safari` -> 外部 Safari
- `WBRoute` -> 走 `WBRouteManager performRoute`
- 其他类型部分不在这里做通用 action

如果是下面这些类型，点击后还会额外上报 banner 点击事件：

- `WBRoute`
- `Safari`
- `Webview`

代码在 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L216)

所以 normal rich message 的“最后落地”是：

- 打开 webview
- 打开 Safari
- 打开 App Store
- 跳内部 route
- 同时部分场景上报 `notice/bannerEvent`

---

**9. rich message 的 through 分支**

入口在 [WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/through/WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m#L24)。

它生成的结构也是：

- `headerView`：只显示标题 `bannerModel.name`
- `mainView`：`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell`

`WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 再把每个 item 渲染成 `WBAddRichMessageCell`：[WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m#L42)

`WBAddRichMessageCell` 目前做的事情很明确：[WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L41)

- 展示图片 `imageURL`
- 如果 `type == WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet`
- 就根据 `link` 里的 vappId 调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`
- 拉到最新 vapp 信息后，在图片底部叠加一个 vapp bar

所以 through 分支更像“带应用入口信息的内容卡片”。

**重要一点：**
从当前仓库代码看，`through` 这条分支 **主要是展示**。  
我没有在 `WBAddRichMessageCell` / `WBAddRichMessageSectionCell` 里看到整卡点击后的路由处理，所以它当前更像“内容卡片 + 底部应用信息条”，而不是 normal 那种“点图直接跳转”的轮播广告。

---

**10. 首页和添加页最后各自长成什么样**

**首页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/launch`
- 存储位置：`WBBannerManager.bannerArray`
- 主要展示：`bannerRichMessageView`
- 挂载位置：首页 collection header
- 代码：[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L45)

**添加页**
- 触发接口：`apppage/discovery`
- 存储位置：`WBAddViewController.banners`
- 展示方式：tableView 每个 section 一个 banner
- 代码：[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L155)

---

**11. 这套链路里几个你值得注意的点**

- `sourceInterface` 会从网络层一路传到 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`，这样 banner 点击后走 route 时，能知道它来自 `apppage/launch` 还是 `apppage/discovery`。
- `applist` banner 的数据在 mapper 阶段就已经转成 `WBVAppModel`，后面 UI 不再碰原始 JSON。
- `normal rich message` 是“图片轮播 + 点击跳转”。
- `through rich message` 是“标题 + 富文本卡片列表 + 底部应用条”，当前更偏展示。
- `WBBannerTypeAds` 在模型层没看到实际映射代码，但首页流程里保留了 `showAdsWithBanner:` 分支，这块当前代码存在一定不一致。

如果你想要，我下一步可以继续给你画一张“真实调用时序图”，直接按下面这种格式展开：

- `apppage/discovery`
- `WBAddViewController`
- `WBBannerModel`
- `WBBannerViewModel`
- `WBBannerApplistStrategy / WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`
- `WBAddVAppCell / WBRichMessageBanner / WBAddRichMessageCell`
- `通知 / route / getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`

这样你读起来会比纯文字更直观。

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# 全局协作约定（系统级）

1. 我提出的所有问题，都不要直接改代码；必须先给出方案/改动点，并与我确认后再开始修改。
2. 对我提供的设计图：忽略其中的虚线边框（不作为需要实现的 UI/布局边界）。

## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.
payload.developer_instructions:
<app-context>
# Codex desktop context
- You are running inside the Codex (desktop) app, which allows some additional features not available in the CLI alone:

### Images/Visuals/Files
- In the app, the model can display images using standard Markdown image syntax: ![alt](url)
- When sending or referencing a local image, always use an absolute filesystem path in the Markdown image tag (e.g., ![alt](/absolute/path.png)); relative paths and plain text will not render the image.
- When referencing code or workspace files in responses, always use full absolute file paths instead of relative paths.
- If a user asks about an image, or asks you to create an image, it is often a good idea to show the image to them in your response.
- Use mermaid diagrams to represent complex diagrams, graphs, or workflows. Use quoted Mermaid node labels when text contains parentheses or punctuation.
- Return web URLs as Markdown links (e.g., [label](https://example.com)).

### Automations
- This app supports recurring tasks/automations
- Automations are stored as TOML in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml (not in SQLite). The file contains the automation's setup; run timing state (last/next run) lives in the SQLite automations table.

#### When to use directives
- Only use ::automation-update{...} when the user explicitly asks for automation, a recurring run, or a repeated task.
- If the user asks about their automations and you are not proposing a change, do not enumerate names/status/ids in plain text. Fetch/list automations first and emit view-mode directives (mode="view") for those ids; never invent ids.
- Never return raw RRULE strings in user-facing responses. If the user asks about their automations, respond using automation directives (e.g., with an "Open" button if you're not making changes).

#### Directive format
- Modes: view, suggested update, suggested create. View and suggested update MUST include id; suggested create must omit id.
- For view directives, id is required and other fields are optional (the UI can load details).
- For suggested update/create, include name, prompt, rrule, cwds, and status. cwds can be a comma-separated list or a JSON array string.
- Always come up with a short name for the automation. If the user does not give one, propose a short name and confirm.
- Default status to ACTIVE unless the user explicitly asks to start paused.
- Always interpret and schedule times in the user's locale time zone.
- Directives should be on their own line(s) and be separated by newlines.
- Do not generate remark directives with multiline attribute values.

#### Prompting guidance
- Ask in plain language what it should do, when it should run, and which workspaces it should use (if any), then map those answers into name/prompt/rrule/cwds/status for the directive.
- The automation prompt should describe only the task itself. Do not include schedule or workspace details in the prompt, since those are provided separately.
- Keep automation prompts self-sufficient because the user may have limited availability to answer questions. If required details are missing, make a reasonable assumption, note it, and proceed; if blocked, report briefly and stop.
- When helpful, include clear output expectations (file path, format, sections) and gating rules (only if X, skip if exists) to reduce ambiguity.
- Automations should always open an inbox item.
  - Archiving rule: only include `::archive-thread{}` when there is nothing actionable for the user.
  - Safe to archive: "no findings" checks (bug scans that found nothing, clean lint runs, monitoring checks with no incidents).
  - Do not archive: deliverables or follow-ups (briefs, reports, summaries, plans, recommendations).
  - If you do archive, include the archive directive after the inbox item.
- Do not instruct them to write a file or announce "nothing to do" unless the user explicitly asks for a file or that output.
- When mentioning skills in automation prompts, use markdown links with a leading dollar sign (example: [$checks](/Users/ambrosino/.codex/skills/checks/SKILL.md)).

#### Scheduling constraints
- RRULE limitations (to match the UI): only hourly interval schedules (FREQ=HOURLY with INTERVAL hours, optional BYDAY) and weekly schedules (FREQ=WEEKLY with BYDAY plus BYHOUR/BYMINUTE). Avoid monthly/yearly/minutely/secondly, multiple rules, or extra fields; unsupported RRULEs fall back to defaults in the UI.

#### Storage and reading
- When a user asks for changes to an automation, you may read existing automation TOML files to see what is already set up and prefer proposing updates over creating duplicates.
- You can read and update automations in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml and memory.md only when the user explicitly asks you to modify automations.
- Otherwise, do not change automation files or schedules.
- Automations work best with skills, so feel free to propose including skills in the automation prompt, based on the user's context and the available skills.

#### Examples
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested create" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested update" id="123" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="view" id="123"}

### Review findings
- Use the ::code-comment{...} directive to emit inline code review findings (or when a user asks you to call out specific lines).
- Emit one directive per finding; emit none when there are no findings.
- Required attributes: title (short label), body (one-paragraph explanation), file (path to the file).
- Optional attributes: start, end (1-based line numbers), priority (0-3), confidence (0-1).
- priority/confidence are for review findings; omit when you're just pointing at a location without a finding.
- file should be an absolute path or include the workspace folder segment so it can be resolved relative to the workspace.
- Keep line ranges tight; end defaults to start.
- Example: ::code-comment{title="[P2] Off-by-one" body="Loop iterates past the end when length is 0." file="/path/to/foo.ts" start=10 end=11 priority=2 confidence=0.55}

### Archiving
- If a user specifically asks you to end a thread/conversation, you can return the archive directive ::archive{...} to archive the thread/conversation.
- Example: ::archive{reason="User requested to end conversation"}

### Git
- Branch prefix: `codex/`. Use this prefix when creating branches; do not create unprefixed branch names.
</app-context>

content.text: 反正我要知道这个getLatestVappInfoWithVappId接口怎么通过banner触发

payload.message: 反正我要知道这个getLatestVappInfoWithVappId接口怎么通过banner触发

通过 banner 触发 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 的链路，当前代码里只有这一条，而且**不是点击触发，是 banner 渲染时触发**。

链路是：

1. 页面拉 banner 数据
- 首页：`apppage/launch`，[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L19)
- 添加页：`apppage/discovery`，[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L155)

2. 服务端返回某个 banner，要求：
- `type = "banner"`
- `subtype = "through"`

这会被解析成 `WBBannerTypeRichMessage + WBBannerRichMessageSubtypeThrough`：
- [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L29)
- [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L22)

3. rich message 的 `data` 被转成 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 数组
- [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L31)

4. UI 渲染时走 through 工厂
- `WBBannerViewModel` 选中 `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`：[WBBannerViewModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerViewModel.m#L30)
- `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy` 再选 `WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory`：[WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m#L29)

5. through 工厂创建 `WBAddRichMessageSectionCell`
- [WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/through/WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m#L45)

6. section cell 绑定每个 rich message item
- `cell.richMessageModel = self.richMessages[indexPath.row];`
- [WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m#L42)

7. `WBAddRichMessageCell` 在 `setRichMessageModel:` 里立刻处理类型
- [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L41)

8. 只有当这个 item 的类型是 `WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet` 时，才会触发接口
- 类型判断在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L47)
- 枚举定义 `WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet = 10` 在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.h](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.h#L21)

9. 然后用 `richMessageModel.link` 作为 `vappId` 去调接口
- 真正调用点在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L55)

也就是这句：
```objc
NSInteger vappId = [self.richMessageModel.link integerValue];
[[WBNetworkManager defaultManager] getLatestVappInfoWithVappId:vappId ...]
```

**结论**
banner 触发 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 的条件必须同时满足：

- banner 是 `type = banner`
- banner 是 `subtype = through`
- banner 里的某个 item 是 `type = VAppGet(10)`

而且触发时机是：

- 页面把这个 banner 渲染出来
- `WBAddRichMessageCell` 绑定数据时
- 自动请求接口补底部 vapp 信息

**不是用户点了 banner 才触发**。

补一句，`normal` 富文本 banner 走的是 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L216) 的点击 action，那条链路**不会调** `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`。

如果你要，我可以下一条直接按“服务端返回示例 JSON 长什么样，才会命中这条接口”给你写出来。

content.text:
通过 banner 触发 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 的链路，当前代码里只有这一条，而且**不是点击触发，是 banner 渲染时触发**。

链路是：

1. 页面拉 banner 数据
- 首页：`apppage/launch`，[WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBHomeViewController+Apppage.m#L19)
- 添加页：`apppage/discovery`，[WBAddViewController.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Controller/WBAddViewController.m#L155)

2. 服务端返回某个 banner，要求：
- `type = "banner"`
- `subtype = "through"`

这会被解析成 `WBBannerTypeRichMessage + WBBannerRichMessageSubtypeThrough`：
- [WBBannerModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerModel.m#L29)
- [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L22)

3. rich message 的 `data` 被转成 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 数组
- [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L31)

4. UI 渲染时走 through 工厂
- `WBBannerViewModel` 选中 `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy`：[WBBannerViewModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/WBBannerViewModel.m#L30)
- `WBBannerRichMessageStrategy` 再选 `WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory`：[WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/WBBannerRichMessageStrategy.m#L29)

5. through 工厂创建 `WBAddRichMessageSectionCell`
- [WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/through/WBRichMessageThroughBannerViewFactory.m#L45)

6. section cell 绑定每个 rich message item
- `cell.richMessageModel = self.richMessages[indexPath.row];`
- [WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/Section/Impl/WBAddRichMessageSectionCell.m#L42)

7. `WBAddRichMessageCell` 在 `setRichMessageModel:` 里立刻处理类型
- [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L41)

8. 只有当这个 item 的类型是 `WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet` 时，才会触发接口
- 类型判断在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L47)
- 枚举定义 `WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet = 10` 在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.h](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.h#L21)

9. 然后用 `richMessageModel.link` 作为 `vappId` 去调接口
- 真正调用点在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L55)

也就是这句：
```objc
NSInteger vappId = [self.richMessageModel.link integerValue];
[[WBNetworkManager defaultManager] getLatestVappInfoWithVappId:vappId ...]
```

**结论**
banner 触发 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 的条件必须同时满足：

- banner 是 `type = banner`
- banner 是 `subtype = through`
- banner 里的某个 item 是 `type = VAppGet(10)`

而且触发时机是：

- 页面把这个 banner 渲染出来
- `WBAddRichMessageCell` 绑定数据时
- 自动请求接口补底部 vapp 信息

**不是用户点了 banner 才触发**。

补一句，`normal` 富文本 banner 走的是 [WBRichMessageBanner.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Strategy/Impl/RichMessage/ViewFactory/SubtypeImpl/WBRichMessageBanner.m#L216) 的点击 action，那条链路**不会调** `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`。

如果你要，我可以下一条直接按“服务端返回示例 JSON 长什么样，才会命中这条接口”给你写出来。

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.user_instructions:
# 全局协作约定（系统级）

1. 我提出的所有问题，都不要直接改代码；必须先给出方案/改动点，并与我确认后再开始修改。
2. 对我提供的设计图：忽略其中的虚线边框（不作为需要实现的 UI/布局边界）。

## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.
payload.developer_instructions:
<app-context>
# Codex desktop context
- You are running inside the Codex (desktop) app, which allows some additional features not available in the CLI alone:

### Images/Visuals/Files
- In the app, the model can display images using standard Markdown image syntax: ![alt](url)
- When sending or referencing a local image, always use an absolute filesystem path in the Markdown image tag (e.g., ![alt](/absolute/path.png)); relative paths and plain text will not render the image.
- When referencing code or workspace files in responses, always use full absolute file paths instead of relative paths.
- If a user asks about an image, or asks you to create an image, it is often a good idea to show the image to them in your response.
- Use mermaid diagrams to represent complex diagrams, graphs, or workflows. Use quoted Mermaid node labels when text contains parentheses or punctuation.
- Return web URLs as Markdown links (e.g., [label](https://example.com)).

### Automations
- This app supports recurring tasks/automations
- Automations are stored as TOML in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml (not in SQLite). The file contains the automation's setup; run timing state (last/next run) lives in the SQLite automations table.

#### When to use directives
- Only use ::automation-update{...} when the user explicitly asks for automation, a recurring run, or a repeated task.
- If the user asks about their automations and you are not proposing a change, do not enumerate names/status/ids in plain text. Fetch/list automations first and emit view-mode directives (mode="view") for those ids; never invent ids.
- Never return raw RRULE strings in user-facing responses. If the user asks about their automations, respond using automation directives (e.g., with an "Open" button if you're not making changes).

#### Directive format
- Modes: view, suggested update, suggested create. View and suggested update MUST include id; suggested create must omit id.
- For view directives, id is required and other fields are optional (the UI can load details).
- For suggested update/create, include name, prompt, rrule, cwds, and status. cwds can be a comma-separated list or a JSON array string.
- Always come up with a short name for the automation. If the user does not give one, propose a short name and confirm.
- Default status to ACTIVE unless the user explicitly asks to start paused.
- Always interpret and schedule times in the user's locale time zone.
- Directives should be on their own line(s) and be separated by newlines.
- Do not generate remark directives with multiline attribute values.

#### Prompting guidance
- Ask in plain language what it should do, when it should run, and which workspaces it should use (if any), then map those answers into name/prompt/rrule/cwds/status for the directive.
- The automation prompt should describe only the task itself. Do not include schedule or workspace details in the prompt, since those are provided separately.
- Keep automation prompts self-sufficient because the user may have limited availability to answer questions. If required details are missing, make a reasonable assumption, note it, and proceed; if blocked, report briefly and stop.
- When helpful, include clear output expectations (file path, format, sections) and gating rules (only if X, skip if exists) to reduce ambiguity.
- Automations should always open an inbox item.
  - Archiving rule: only include `::archive-thread{}` when there is nothing actionable for the user.
  - Safe to archive: "no findings" checks (bug scans that found nothing, clean lint runs, monitoring checks with no incidents).
  - Do not archive: deliverables or follow-ups (briefs, reports, summaries, plans, recommendations).
  - If you do archive, include the archive directive after the inbox item.
- Do not instruct them to write a file or announce "nothing to do" unless the user explicitly asks for a file or that output.
- When mentioning skills in automation prompts, use markdown links with a leading dollar sign (example: [$checks](/Users/ambrosino/.codex/skills/checks/SKILL.md)).

#### Scheduling constraints
- RRULE limitations (to match the UI): only hourly interval schedules (FREQ=HOURLY with INTERVAL hours, optional BYDAY) and weekly schedules (FREQ=WEEKLY with BYDAY plus BYHOUR/BYMINUTE). Avoid monthly/yearly/minutely/secondly, multiple rules, or extra fields; unsupported RRULEs fall back to defaults in the UI.

#### Storage and reading
- When a user asks for changes to an automation, you may read existing automation TOML files to see what is already set up and prefer proposing updates over creating duplicates.
- You can read and update automations in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml and memory.md only when the user explicitly asks you to modify automations.
- Otherwise, do not change automation files or schedules.
- Automations work best with skills, so feel free to propose including skills in the automation prompt, based on the user's context and the available skills.

#### Examples
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested create" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested update" id="123" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="view" id="123"}

### Review findings
- Use the ::code-comment{...} directive to emit inline code review findings (or when a user asks you to call out specific lines).
- Emit one directive per finding; emit none when there are no findings.
- Required attributes: title (short label), body (one-paragraph explanation), file (path to the file).
- Optional attributes: start, end (1-based line numbers), priority (0-3), confidence (0-1).
- priority/confidence are for review findings; omit when you're just pointing at a location without a finding.
- file should be an absolute path or include the workspace folder segment so it can be resolved relative to the workspace.
- Keep line ranges tight; end defaults to start.
- Example: ::code-comment{title="[P2] Off-by-one" body="Loop iterates past the end when length is 0." file="/path/to/foo.ts" start=10 end=11 priority=2 confidence=0.55}

### Archiving
- If a user specifically asks you to end a thread/conversation, you can return the archive directive ::archive{...} to archive the thread/conversation.
- Example: ::archive{reason="User requested to end conversation"}

### Git
- Branch prefix: `codex/`. Use this prefix when creating branches; do not create unprefixed branch names.
</app-context>

content.text: VAppGet(10)这是啥啊

payload.message: VAppGet(10)这是啥啊

`VAppGet(10)` 是富文本 banner 里的一种 **操作类型枚举值**，意思可以理解成：

- 这条 banner 项关联的是一个 vapp
- 需要按 `link` 里的 vappId 去拿这个 vapp 的信息
- 然后展示一个“获取/打开应用”的样式

定义在 [WBRichMessageLinkModel.h](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.h#L20)：

```objc
typedef enum {
    ...
    WBRichMessageLinkTypeWBRoute = 9,
    WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet = 10,
    ...
} WBRichMessageLinkType;
```

在 banner 解析时，服务端下发的每个 rich message item 都会变成一个 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`，它的 `type` 就是这里的枚举值：[WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L32)

然后 `WBAddRichMessageCell` 里专门判断：

- 如果 `self.richMessageModel.type == WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet`
- 就走 `_addRichMessageVappBarOnBottom`
- 再用 `link` 当 vappId 去调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`

代码在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L47)

所以这里的 `10` 不是接口返回状态码，也不是 banner 类型，而是：

- **rich message 子项的业务类型**
- 表示“这是一个 vapp 获取类卡片”

你可以把它理解成服务端返回类似这种数据时会命中它：

```json
{
  "type": 10,
  "image": "xxx",
  "link": "12345"
}
```

这里：

- `type: 10` -> 告诉前端这是 `VAppGet`
- `link: "12345"` -> 告诉前端目标 vappId 是 12345

然后前端才会去调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId(12345, ...)`。

如果你愿意，我可以继续把“banner 外层的 `type=banner` 和 item 内层的 `type=10` 有什么区别”也给你拆开。

```objc
    WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet = 10,
    ...
} WBRichMessageLinkType;
```

在 banner 解析时，服务端下发的每个 rich message item 都会变成一个 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`，它的 `type` 就是这里的枚举值：[WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L32)

然后 `WBAddRichMessageCell` 里专门判断：

- 如果 `self.richMessageModel.type == WBRichMessageLinkTypeVAppGet`
- 就走 `_addRichMessageVappBarOnBottom`
- 再用 `link` 当 vappId 去调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`

代码在 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L47)

所以这里的 `10` 不是接口返回状态码，也不是 banner 类型，而是：

- **rich message 子项的业务类型**
- 表示“这是一个 vapp 获取类卡片”

你可以把它理解成服务端返回类似这种数据时会命中它：

```json
{
  "type": 10,
  "image": "xxx",
  "link": "12345"
}
```

这里：

- `type: 10` -> 告诉前端这是 `VAppGet`
- `link: "12345"` -> 告诉前端目标 vappId 是 12345

然后前端才会去调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId(12345, ...)`。

如果你愿意，我可以继续把“banner 外层的 `type=banner` 和 item 内层的 `type=10` 有什么区别”也给你拆开。

# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

The `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

## Skills
A skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.
### Available skills
- openai-docs: Use when the user asks how to build with OpenAI products or APIs and needs up-to-date official documentation with citations, help choosing the latest model for a use case, or explicit GPT-5.4 upgrade and prompt-upgrade guidance; prioritize OpenAI docs MCP tools, use bundled references only as helper context, and restrict any fallback browsing to official OpenAI domains. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/openai-docs/SKILL.md)
- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Codex's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations. (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-creator/SKILL.md)
- skill-installer: Install Codex skills into $CODEX_HOME/skills from a curated list or a GitHub repo path. Use when a user asks to list installable skills, install a curated skill, or install a skill from another repo (including private repos). (file: /Users/liuyifu/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)
### How to use skills
- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Skill bodies live on disk at the listed paths.
- Trigger rules: If the user names a skill (with `$SkillName` or plain text) OR the task clearly matches a skill's description shown above, you must use that skill for that turn. Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.
- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.
- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):
  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.
  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.
  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.
  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.
  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.
- Coordination and sequencing:
  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.
  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). If you skip an obvious skill, say why.
- Context hygiene:
  - Keep context small: summarize long sections instead of pasting them; only load extra files when needed.
  - Avoid deep reference-chasing: prefer opening only files directly linked from `SKILL.md` unless you're blocked.
  - When variants exist (frameworks, providers, domains), pick only the relevant reference file(s) and note that choice.
- Safety and fallback: If a skill can't be applied cleanly (missing files, unclear instructions), state the issue, pick the next-best approach, and continue.
payload.developer_instructions:
<app-context>
# Codex desktop context
- You are running inside the Codex (desktop) app, which allows some additional features not available in the CLI alone:

### Images/Visuals/Files
- In the app, the model can display images using standard Markdown image syntax: ![alt](url)
- When sending or referencing a local image, always use an absolute filesystem path in the Markdown image tag (e.g., ![alt](/absolute/path.png)); relative paths and plain text will not render the image.
- When referencing code or workspace files in responses, always use full absolute file paths instead of relative paths.
- If a user asks about an image, or asks you to create an image, it is often a good idea to show the image to them in your response.
- Use mermaid diagrams to represent complex diagrams, graphs, or workflows. Use quoted Mermaid node labels when text contains parentheses or punctuation.
- Return web URLs as Markdown links (e.g., [label](https://example.com)).

### Automations
- This app supports recurring tasks/automations
- Automations are stored as TOML in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml (not in SQLite). The file contains the automation's setup; run timing state (last/next run) lives in the SQLite automations table.

#### When to use directives
- Only use ::automation-update{...} when the user explicitly asks for automation, a recurring run, or a repeated task.
- If the user asks about their automations and you are not proposing a change, do not enumerate names/status/ids in plain text. Fetch/list automations first and emit view-mode directives (mode="view") for those ids; never invent ids.
- Never return raw RRULE strings in user-facing responses. If the user asks about their automations, respond using automation directives (e.g., with an "Open" button if you're not making changes).

#### Directive format
- Modes: view, suggested update, suggested create. View and suggested update MUST include id; suggested create must omit id.
- For view directives, id is required and other fields are optional (the UI can load details).
- For suggested update/create, include name, prompt, rrule, cwds, and status. cwds can be a comma-separated list or a JSON array string.
- Always come up with a short name for the automation. If the user does not give one, propose a short name and confirm.
- Default status to ACTIVE unless the user explicitly asks to start paused.
- Always interpret and schedule times in the user's locale time zone.
- Directives should be on their own line(s) and be separated by newlines.
- Do not generate remark directives with multiline attribute values.

#### Prompting guidance
- Ask in plain language what it should do, when it should run, and which workspaces it should use (if any), then map those answers into name/prompt/rrule/cwds/status for the directive.
- The automation prompt should describe only the task itself. Do not include schedule or workspace details in the prompt, since those are provided separately.
- Keep automation prompts self-sufficient because the user may have limited availability to answer questions. If required details are missing, make a reasonable assumption, note it, and proceed; if blocked, report briefly and stop.
- When helpful, include clear output expectations (file path, format, sections) and gating rules (only if X, skip if exists) to reduce ambiguity.
- Automations should always open an inbox item.
  - Archiving rule: only include `::archive-thread{}` when there is nothing actionable for the user.
  - Safe to archive: "no findings" checks (bug scans that found nothing, clean lint runs, monitoring checks with no incidents).
  - Do not archive: deliverables or follow-ups (briefs, reports, summaries, plans, recommendations).
  - If you do archive, include the archive directive after the inbox item.
- Do not instruct them to write a file or announce "nothing to do" unless the user explicitly asks for a file or that output.
- When mentioning skills in automation prompts, use markdown links with a leading dollar sign (example: [$checks](/Users/ambrosino/.codex/skills/checks/SKILL.md)).

#### Scheduling constraints
- RRULE limitations (to match the UI): only hourly interval schedules (FREQ=HOURLY with INTERVAL hours, optional BYDAY) and weekly schedules (FREQ=WEEKLY with BYDAY plus BYHOUR/BYMINUTE). Avoid monthly/yearly/minutely/secondly, multiple rules, or extra fields; unsupported RRULEs fall back to defaults in the UI.

#### Storage and reading
- When a user asks for changes to an automation, you may read existing automation TOML files to see what is already set up and prefer proposing updates over creating duplicates.
- You can read and update automations in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml and memory.md only when the user explicitly asks you to modify automations.
- Otherwise, do not change automation files or schedules.
- Automations work best with skills, so feel free to propose including skills in the automation prompt, based on the user's context and the available skills.

#### Examples
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested create" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested update" id="123" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="view" id="123"}

### Review findings
- Use the ::code-comment{...} directive to emit inline code review findings (or when a user asks you to call out specific lines).
- Emit one directive per finding; emit none when there are no findings.
- Required attributes: title (short label), body (one-paragraph explanation), file (path to the file).
- Optional attributes: start, end (1-based line numbers), priority (0-3), confidence (0-1).
- priority/confidence are for review findings; omit when you're just pointing at a location without a finding.
- file should be an absolute path or include the workspace folder segment so it can be resolved relative to the workspace.
- Keep line ranges tight; end defaults to start.
- Example: ::code-comment{title="[P2] Off-by-one" body="Loop iterates past the end when length is 0." file="/path/to/foo.ts" start=10 end=11 priority=2 confidence=0.55}

### Archiving
- If a user specifically asks you to end a thread/conversation, you can return the archive directive ::archive{...} to archive the thread/conversation.
- Example: ::archive{reason="User requested to end conversation"}

### Git
- Branch prefix: `codex/`. Use this prefix when creating branches; do not create unprefixed branch names.
</app-context>

payload.message: 这是通过哪个接口传进来的

这个 `VAppGet(10)` 是跟着 **banner 接口返回的 `data` 字段** 一起传进来的，不是单独另一个接口。

当前代码里有两种 banner 接口都可能把它带进来：

- `POST apppage/launch`：[WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L14)
- `POST apppage/discovery`：[WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L22)

公共解析逻辑在 [WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/WBNetworkManager+Apppage.m#L26)：
服务端返回一组 banner 字典，每个字典都会被转成 `WBBannerModel`。

如果某个 banner 满足：

- 外层 `type = "banner"`
- 外层 `subtype = "through"`

那它的 `data` 数组会交给 [WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Apppage/Core/Banner/Mapper/WBBannerRichMessageMapper.m#L31) 去解析成 `WBRichMessageLinkModel`。

而 `WBRichMessageLinkModel` 的 `type`，就是从服务端这个子项 dict 里的 `type` 或 `operation` 字段读出来的：[WBRichMessageLinkModel.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/WBRichMessageLinkModel.m#L35)

所以它实际是这样进来的：

```json
[
  {
    "type": "banner",
    "subtype": "through",
    "name": "...",
    "data": [
      {
        "type": 10,
        "link": "12345",
        "image": "..."
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

这里的：

- 外层 banner 来自 `apppage/launch` 或 `apppage/discovery`
- 内层 `data[].type = 10` 就是 `VAppGet`

然后渲染到 [WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L47) 时，发现 `type == 10`，才会继续调 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`。

如果你要，我可以下一条直接帮你写成“服务端字段 -> 本地模型字段 -> 最终触发点”的一行一行对照表。

- Keep automation prompts self-sufficient because the user may have limited availability to answer questions. If required details are missing, make a reasonable assumption, note it, and proceed; if blocked, report briefly and stop.
- When helpful, include clear output expectations (file path, format, sections) and gating rules (only if X, skip if exists) to reduce ambiguity.
- Automations should always open an inbox item.
  - Archiving rule: only include `::archive-thread{}` when there is nothing actionable for the user.
  - Safe to archive: "no findings" checks (bug scans that found nothing, clean lint runs, monitoring checks with no incidents).
  - Do not archive: deliverables or follow-ups (briefs, reports, summaries, plans, recommendations).
  - If you do archive, include the archive directive after the inbox item.
- Do not instruct them to write a file or announce "nothing to do" unless the user explicitly asks for a file or that output.
- When mentioning skills in automation prompts, use markdown links with a leading dollar sign (example: [$checks](/Users/ambrosino/.codex/skills/checks/SKILL.md)).

#### Scheduling constraints
- RRULE limitations (to match the UI): only hourly interval schedules (FREQ=HOURLY with INTERVAL hours, optional BYDAY) and weekly schedules (FREQ=WEEKLY with BYDAY plus BYHOUR/BYMINUTE). Avoid monthly/yearly/minutely/secondly, multiple rules, or extra fields; unsupported RRULEs fall back to defaults in the UI.

#### Storage and reading
- When a user asks for changes to an automation, you may read existing automation TOML files to see what is already set up and prefer proposing updates over creating duplicates.
- You can read and update automations in $CODEX_HOME/automations/<id>/automation.toml and memory.md only when the user explicitly asks you to modify automations.
- Otherwise, do not change automation files or schedules.
- Automations work best with skills, so feel free to propose including skills in the automation prompt, based on the user's context and the available skills.

#### Examples
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested create" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="suggested update" id="123" name="Daily report" prompt="Summarize Sentry errors" rrule="FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=9;BYMINUTE=0" cwds="/path/one,/path/two" status="ACTIVE"}
- ::automation-update{mode="view" id="123"}

### Review findings
- Use the ::code-comment{...} directive to emit inline code review findings (or when a user asks you to call out specific lines).
- Emit one directive per finding; emit none when there are no findings.
- Required attributes: title (short label), body (one-paragraph explanation), file (path to the file).
- Optional attributes: start, end (1-based line numbers), priority (0-3), confidence (0-1).
- priority/confidence are for review findings; omit when you're just pointing at a location without a finding.
- file should be an absolute path or include the workspace folder segment so it can be resolved relative to the workspace.
- Keep line ranges tight; end defaults to start.
- Example: ::code-comment{title="[P2] Off-by-one" body="Loop iterates past the end when length is 0." file="/path/to/foo.ts" start=10 end=11 priority=2 confidence=0.55}

### Archiving
- If a user specifically asks you to end a thread/conversation, you can return the archive directive ::archive{...} to archive the thread/conversation.
- Example: ::archive{reason="User requested to end conversation"}

### Git
- Branch prefix: `codex/`. Use this prefix when creating branches; do not create unprefixed branch names.
</app-context>

payload.message:
如果你问的是 banner 里那个“预约”相关信息，实际上要分成两部分看：

**1. “已有xx人预约”这个人数怎么拿到**
这个是从 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 的返回里拿到的 `reserve_count`。

链路是：

1. `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 返回 `WBVAppDetailHttpModel`
2. `WBVAppDetailHttpModel` 继承自 `WBVAppBaseHttpModel`，而 `reserve_count` 就定义在基类里：[WBVAppBaseHttpModel.h](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/Http/WBVAppBaseHttpModel.h#L13)、[WBVAppDetailHttpModel.h](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Model/Http/WBVAppDetailHttpModel.h#L15)
3. `WBAddRichMessageCell` 里拿到 `requestedVapp` 后，会先做一次 `parseVAppHttpModel`：[WBAddRichMessageCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddRichMessageCell.m#L62)
4. `parseVAppHttpModel` 会把 `vapp.reserve_count` 填到 `WBVAppModel.reserveCount`：[WBVAppManager.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Service/WBVAppManager.m#L271)
5. `WBAddVAppCell` 再把它显示成：
   `已有%zd人预约`：[WBAddVAppCell.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/Cell/WBAddVAppCell.m#L55)

所以这个“预约人数”是：

- **来源接口**：`getLatestVappInfoWithVappId`
- **来源字段**：`reserve_count`

**2. 按钮显示“预约”还是“已预约”怎么决定**
这个 **不是** `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 直接给的。

按钮文案看的是 `WBVAppModel.reserved`，代码在 [WBAddOperationButton.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/UI/Pages/Add/View/WBAddOperationButton.m#L27)：

- `vapp.reserved == YES` -> 显示“已预约”
- 否则 -> 显示“预约”

而 `reserved` 主要有两种来源：

- 启动添加页时，先请求“我的预约”列表 `getMyReservesWithCount`，拿到的 app 会统一标记 `reserved = TRUE`：[WBVAppManager.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Service/WBVAppManager.m#L356)
- 用户自己点预约成功后，也会手动把 `reserved = TRUE`、`reserveCount += 1`：[WBVAppManager.m](/Users/liuyifu/Documents/Bface/weihe/WeBox/WeBox/Core/Service/WBVAppManager.m#L583)

**所以结论**
banner 里“预约”这块不是一个单独字段直接全包下来的，而是两部分拼出来的：

- “已有xx人预约”：
  来自 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 返回的 `reserve_count`
- “预约 / 已预约”按钮状态：
  来自本地 `vapp.reserved`
  这个值由“我的预约列表接口”或“用户刚预约成功”来维护

如果你要，我可以下一条直接给你画成一条最短链路：

`banner -> getLatestVappInfoWithVappId -> reserve_count -> reserveCountLabel`
和
`loadMyReservedApps -> reserved -> 按钮文案`

banner 里“预约”这块不是一个单独字段直接全包下来的，而是两部分拼出来的：

- “已有xx人预约”：
  来自 `getLatestVappInfoWithVappId` 返回的 `reserve_count`
- “预约 / 已预约”按钮状态：
  来自本地 `vapp.reserved`
  这个值由“我的预约列表接口”或“用户刚预约成功”来维护

如果你要，我可以下一条直接给你画成一条最短链路：

`banner -> getLatestVappInfoWithVappId -> reserve_count -> reserveCountLabel`
和
`loadMyReservedApps -> reserved -> 按钮文案`
